omnigent-ai/omnigent.description: Run a coding or knowledge-work agent on your laptop, pick it back up from your phone, and share the live session with a teammate. One command stands up a local agent server with a terminal UI and a web UI — so the same session is reachable from your terminal, your browser, and your phone

A meta-harness for all your AI agents. Omnigent provides a common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and the agents you write yourself: swap or combine harnesses without rewriting, keep them in check with policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time on the same live session, from any device.

Knight1112D/Tienkung_vla_collect_data.description: This script is used for data collection on the Tiangong 2.0 robot. It supports three-camera data acquisition, 6-DOF dexterity hand and grasper input, and can automatically collect topic content, frequency, and head tilt commands. Convenient data collection allows for one-click stopping and exiting.
